name: bormagi
description: AI coding agent manager — create, configure, and chat with named agents powered by your choice of LLM.

bormagi.defaultModel.gemini.description: Default model for Google Gemini provider.

bormagi.contextMaxFiles.description: Maximum number of workspace files to include in agent context.

bormagi.contextMaxFileSizeKb.description: Maximum size (KB) of a single file to include in context.

bormagi.contextCacheTtlSeconds.description: How long to reuse scanned workspace context (seconds) before rescanning.

bormagi.contextRepoSummaryChars.description: Maximum characters for the repository bootstrap summary.

bormagi.contextRetrievalTopFiles.description: Maximum number of task-relevant files to include per request.

bormagi.contextRetrievalSnippetChars.description: Maximum characters per retrieved file snippet in task context.

bormagi.maxOutputTokens.description: Maximum output tokens requested from the model per completion call.

bormagi.showThoughtTrace.description: Show agent thought trace (tool calls and reasoning) in the chat view.

bormagi.defaultProvider.type.description: Default LLM provider used when an agent has no provider configured.

bormagi.defaultProvider.model.description: Default model for the default provider.

bormagi.defaultProvider.authMethod.description: Default auth method for the default provider.

bormagi.contextPipeline.enabled.description: Enable the enhanced context pipeline (HookEngine, PlanManager, StablePrefixCache, CapabilityRegistry). Defaults to false until regression validation confirms no quality loss.

bormagi.contextPipeline.hooks.configPath.description: Path to hooks configuration JSON file (relative to workspace root, or absolute). Defaults to .bormagi/hooks.json when empty.

bormagi.contextPipeline.capabilities.dir.description: Directory containing capability manifest files. Defaults to .bormagi/capabilities/ when empty.

bormagi.contextPipeline.capabilities.max.description: Maximum tokens a single dynamically-loaded capability may consume in the system prompt.

bormagi.contextPipeline.plans.storageLoc.description: Where to write plan artifacts. 'workspace-root' writes PLAN-<ts>.md to the workspace root (default). 'bormagi-plans' writes only to .bormagi/plans/.

bormagi.contextPipeline.plans.writePlanM.description: Whether to write a human-readable PLAN-<timestamp>.md in addition to the machine-readable .bormagi/plans/plan-<timestamp>.json.

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.plan.sta.description: Token budget for the stable system-prompt prefix (plan mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.plan.mem.description: Token budget for session memory (plan mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.plan.rep.description: Token budget for the repository map (plan mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.plan.ret.description: Token budget for retrieved code context (plan mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.plan.too.description: Token budget for tool outputs (plan mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.plan.con.description: Token budget for recent conversation history (plan mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.plan.use.description: Token budget reserved for the user's current input (plan mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.plan.res.description: Safety margin kept free for model output (plan mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.edit.sta.description: Token budget for the stable system-prompt prefix (edit mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.edit.mem.description: Token budget for session memory (edit mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.edit.rep.description: Token budget for the repository map (edit mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.edit.ret.description: Token budget for retrieved code context (edit mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.edit.too.description: Token budget for tool outputs (edit mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.edit.con.description: Token budget for recent conversation history (edit mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.edit.use.description: Token budget reserved for the user's current input (edit mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.edit.res.description: Safety margin kept free for model output (edit mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.debug.st.description: Token budget for the stable system-prompt prefix (debug mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.debug.me.description: Token budget for session memory (debug mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.debug.re.description: Token budget for the repository map (debug mode).
Token budget for retrieved code context (debug mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.debug.to.description: Token budget for tool outputs (debug mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.debug.co.description: Token budget for recent conversation history (debug mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.debug.us.description: Token budget reserved for the user's current input (debug mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.debug.re.description: Safety margin kept free for model output (debug mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.review.s.description: Token budget for the stable system-prompt prefix (review mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.review.m.description: Token budget for session memory (review mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.review.r.description: Token budget for the repository map (review mode).
Token budget for retrieved code context (review mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.review.t.description: Token budget for tool outputs (review mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.review.c.description: Token budget for recent conversation history (review mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.review.u.description: Token budget reserved for the user's current input (review mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.review.r.description: Safety margin kept free for model output (review mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.explain..description: Token budget for the stable system-prompt prefix (explain mode).
Token budget for session memory (explain mode).
Token budget for the repository map (explain mode).
Token budget for retrieved code context (explain mode).
Token budget for tool outputs (explain mode).
Token budget for recent conversation history (explain mode).
Token budget reserved for the user's current input (explain mode).
Safety margin kept free for model output (explain mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.search.s.description: Token budget for the stable system-prompt prefix (search mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.search.m.description: Token budget for session memory (search mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.search.r.description: Token budget for the repository map (search mode).
Token budget for retrieved code context (search mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.search.t.description: Token budget for tool outputs (search mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.search.c.description: Token budget for recent conversation history (search mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.search.u.description: Token budget reserved for the user's current input (search mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.search.r.description: Safety margin kept free for model output (search mode).

bormagi.contextPipeline.budgets.test-fix.description: Token budget for the stable system-prompt prefix (test-fix mode).
Token budget for session memory (test-fix mode).
Token budget for the repository map (test-fix mode).
Token budget for retrieved code context (test-fix mode).
Token budget for tool outputs (test-fix mode).
Token budget for recent conversation history (test-fix mode).
Token budget reserved for the user's current input (test-fix mode).
Safety margin kept free for model output (test-fix mode).

bormagi.sandbox.enabled.description: Whether to use an isolated sandbox for agent operations. If disabled, agents write directly to the workspace.

bormagi.sandbox.requireConfirmation.description: When sandbox is disabled, require manual confirmation before writing or editing files. Defaults to false.

bormagi.executionEngineV2.description: Enable the V2 execution engine with authoritative state mutations, tool-result channel isolation, hard runtime guards (reread prevention, discovery budget), and improved continue/resume. Phases 1–3 of the execution layer fixes.

bormagi.validatorEnforcement.description: When enabled alongside executionEngineV2, the consistency validator will auto-fix safe issues (e.g. adding missing package.json dependencies). Requires executionEngineV2 to be true.

bormagi.developerMode.description: Enable developer-mode debug commands: bormagi.showExecutionState and bormagi.resetExecutionState. Commands are hidden when this setting is false.
